formulas.name: Structural Formula of Alcohols
formulas.notes: Representation of alcohols with an alkyl group and an -OH group

formulas.name: Structural Formula of Phenols
formulas.notes: Representation of phenols with an aryl group and an -OH group

formulas.name: Structural Formula of Ethers
formulas.notes: Representation of ethers with two alkyl groups linked by an -O- group

formulas.name: pKa of Alcohols and Phenols
formulas.notes: Calculation of pKa of alcohols and phenols

formulas.name: Acidic Strength of Alcohols and Phenols
formulas.notes: Relationship between acidic strength and Ka of alcohols and phenols

formulas.name: Basicity of Alcohols
formulas.notes: Key statement: Alcohols are weak bases and can accept a proton to form alkoxides

formulas.name: Reimer-Tiemann Reaction
formulas.notes: Key statement: Phenol reacts with chloroform and sodium hydroxide to form salicylaldehyde

formulas.name: Williamson Synthesis
formulas.notes: Key statement: Alkyl halide reacts with sodium alkoxide to form an ether
